product_information.description:
Het product
A highly concentrated, weightless, restorative styling oil.
Hoe werkt het?
Olaplex® Bonding Oil is more than just a styling oil. N°7 not only provides unparalleled shine and softness, but also strengthens the hair structure at the core. It minimizes flyaways and frizz and offers UV and heat protection up to 232°C.
Gebruik
Distribute just a few drops through the hair.
Ingrediёnten
Dimethicone, Isohexadecane, C13-14 Isoparaffin, Coco-Caprylate, Phenyl Trimethicone, Bis-Aminopropyl Diglycol Dimaleate, Propanediol, Zea Mays (Corn) Oil, Beta-Carotene, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Moringa Oleifera Seed Oil, Punica Granatum Seed Oil, Water (Aqua/Eau), Morinda Citrifolia Fruit Powder, Fragrance (Parfum), Hexyl Cinnamal, Eclipta Prostrata Extract, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Limonene, Tocopherol, Citral, Linalool, Melia Azadirachta Leaf Extract, Citronellol, Pseudozyma Epicola/Camellia Sinensis Seed Oil Ferment Extract Filtrate
Meer over
all hair types, PH value, Vegan, Animal testing freem Gluten Free, Free from nuts, paraben free, free from phosphates, sulfate free
